title: ctenopteris deltodon
intro: Ctenopteris deltodon, also known as the lace fern, is a type of plant species native to New Zealand. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of ctenopteris deltodon include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
